content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reject the amendment. Its factual premise is wrong on both the reviewed diff and the active configuration path.

## Votes

- `fr-7-714ee05a`: Reject
  Relative to the round-7 review base (`285e3d85..HEAD`), the change set is not limited to runtime artifacts: it also changes `src/contexts/agent_execution/policy.rs`, `src/contexts/agent_execution/diagnostics.rs`, and adds regression coverage in `tests/unit/backend_policy_test.rs` and `tests/unit/backend_diagnostics_test.rs`. Separately, the cited `codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh` + `codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh` final-review panel is explained by the authoritative live project override in `.git/ralph-burning-live/projects/utm/config.toml`; `FileSystem::project_root()` prefers that live project root, and `EffectiveConfig::load_for_project()` reads project config from it. The resume path in `engine.rs` re-resolves the current panel, compares full reviewer identities via `resolution_has_drifted()`, and only uses the persisted snapshot as drift-detection/update state. That means the checked-in snapshot is recording current run resolution, not acting as the implementation of default-policy behavior or silently replaying stale reviewer targets.
